title: Invoking integer overflow in NewNTUnicodeString in golang.org/x/sys/windows
snippet: NewNTUnicodeString does not check for string length overflow. When provided with a string that overflows the maximum size of a NTUnicodeString (a 16-bit number of bytes), it returns a truncated string

title: Invoking denial of service when parsing arbitrary HTML in golang.org/x/net/html
snippet: Parsing arbitrary HTML can consume excessive CPU time, possibly leading to denial of service.

title: Invoking failure to reject ASCII-only Punycode-encoded labels in golang.org/x/net/idna
snippet: The ToASCII and ToUnicode functions incorrectly accept Punycode-encoded labels that decode to an ASCII-only label. For example, ToUnicode("xn--example-.com") incorrectly returns the name "example.com"

title: Invoking auth bypass via unenforced @revoked status in golang.org/x/crypto/ssh/knownhosts
snippet: Previously, a revoked 'SignatureKey' belonging to a CA was not correctly checked for revocation. Now, both the 'key' and 'key.SignatureKey' are checked for @revoked.

title: Invoking server panic during CheckHostKey/Authenticate in golang.org/x/crypto/ssh
